FEC: 26 race(s) moved. Evan Turnage (US House, MS-2): $0 → $461,473.51 · Dr. Thomas Fisher (US House, IL-7): $0 → $947,370.63 · Delia Ramirez (US House, IL-3 (incumbent)): $0 → $793,478.13 · Brian Poindexter (US House, OH-7): $0 → $125,937.12 · Dan Osborn (US Senate (Independent)): $0 → $23,304,743.52

New ad creatives: Eric Jones: 14 new (Congressional Candidate Eric Jones Makes) · Graham Platner: 15 new (Donald Trump Said This About Me) · Micah Lasher: 15 new (Welcome to the Upper West Side) · David Seligman: 15 new (Seligman for AG - Compassion in Law) · Abdul El-Sayed: 15 new (Our new ad, “Stopwatch.”) · Mandela Barnes: 10 new (Mandela Barnes on MSNOW's The Weekend)
Initial seed from primary-countdown. No live data pulled yet.

OH-7-2026.notes: Poindexter won 8-way Dem primary ~37%. Solid R district.

PA-8-2026.notes: Cognetti (Scranton mayor) challenging freshman R. Leans R.

PA-7-2026.notes: Toss-up. Freshman R flipped seat 2024 by ~1pt.

DC-Delegate-2026.notes: Open seat; White won June 16 primary ~63%. Safe-D.

OH-AG-2026.notes: Kulewicz won May 5 Dem primary (def. Elliot Forhan). Open seat.

NE-Sen-2026.notes: Dem nominee Burbank pledged to drop out and back Osborn. Effectively Osborn vs Ricketts.

CA-InsComm-2026.notes: Top-two: Kim vs Ben Allen (both D). Republican missed cut.

ME-Sen-2026.notes: Platner won June 9 primary; Mills withdrew pre-primary.

NY-13-2026.notes: Main contest: incumbent Espaillat vs our DSA-backed Avila Chevalier. GOP nominee via parallel 6/23 primary (pending). Several minor Dem filers omitted.

NY-10-2026.notes: Lander leading incumbent Goldman by ~19-34pts in polls. GOP general opp pending (6/23 primary). Safe-D.

NY-7-2026.notes: OPEN (Velázquez retiring). Valdez frontrunner vs Reynoso (Velázquez-backed). GOP opp pending. Safe-D.

NY-12-2026.notes: OPEN (Nadler retiring, endorsed Lasher). ~10-way Dem primary; Lasher & Alex Bores lead. NOTE: Alex Bores already appears in the competitive inbox (Nexstar comp). GOP slate was a Ballotpedia cross-listing artifact — omitted pending recheck.

UT-1-2026.seatHeldBy: redrawn open seat (Blake Moore R moved to UT-2)
UT-1-2026.notes: Redrawn D-leaning open seat. Blouin trails former Rep. Ben McAdams in primary polling. Owen won GOP convention.

CO-AG-2026.notes: Open seat; 5-way Dem primary. GOP nominee via 6/30 primary.

CO-4-2026.notes: Laubacher sole Dem on ballot. Boebert incumbent, Trump-endorsed. Deep-red.

MI-Sen-2026.notes: OPEN (Peters retiring). Leading trio El-Sayed/McMorrow/Stevens. GOP frontrunner Mike Rogers (2024 nominee).

MI-13-2026.notes: McKinney (Sanders/Tlaib/WFP) vs incumbent Thanedar lead a 6-way primary. Safe-D.

MI-SD1-2026.notes: Open Dem-held seat (Geiss term-limited, redrawn). Onwenu vs Aiyash head-to-head. Strongly D.

TN-9-2026.notes: OPEN seat — Cohen retiring after GOP redistricting (announced 5/15/26). Not a Cohen challenge. GOP primary pending.

WI-Gov-2026.notes: OPEN (Evers declining 3rd term). Barnes presumptive frontrunner. GOP: Tom Tiffany (Trump-endorsed) favorite.

AK-Sen-2026.notes: Top-4 nonpartisan primary → RCV general. Peltola vs incumbent Sullivan (R) the main contest.

AK-Gov-2026.notes: Top-4 open seat (Dunleavy term-limited). 11 R / 3 D / 3 ind. Dahlstrom (R) dropped out 6/1.

FL-Sen-2026.notes: SPECIAL for Rubio's seat. Mujica is a MINOR candidate; Vindman is Dem fundraising frontrunner ($8.2M). Moody heavy GOP favorite.

IL-Sen-2026.notes: OPEN seat. Tracy med-confidence (projected, confirm cert). Solid/Likely D.
